item.title: kierangill_DM: Kieran Gill @kierangill_DM · 12min Didn’t mention it in my write-up, but Marc Cucurella tried dashing down the tunnel af
item.description: Kieran Gill @kierangill_DM · 12min Didn’t mention it in my write-up, but Marc Cucurella tried dashing down the tunnel after full-time, only to be told to turn around by Willie Isa. Two years remaining on Cucurella’s contract this summer. Could end up one of those sold unless Chelsea convince him to extend Cita Kieran Gill @kierangill_DM · 1h “We want our Chelsea back.” The supporters at Stamford Bridge no longer recognise their club. So used to conquering, now they cannot score, and cannot defend. Report: https:// dailymail.co.uk/sport/football /article-15742111/Chelsea-Man-United-Premier-League-Liam-Rosenior-Matheus-Cunha.html?ico=authors_pagination_mobile … 4 9 64 5 mil

City Xtra @City_Xtra · 13min #OnThisDay: Everton 0-2 #ManCity [2025]
[84'] @oreilly_nico
[90+2’] @mateokovacic8 De Manchester City 2 9 121 2 mil

item.title:
ManUtd: Manchester United @ManUtd · 17min Not a bad birthday weekend for Kobbie
Our midfield maestro turns 21 today! 221 776
item.description:
